data.acceptance: Verification steps are stored as a list of strings on the work item model and persisted correctly; `kno new` can set verification steps when creating a work item; `kno update` can add, replace, or otherwise modify verification steps without affecting unrelated fields; `kno show` displays verification steps clearly as a list; `--json` output includes verification steps in the work item payload; all updated CLI surfaces handle the field consistently and existing non-related behavior remains unchanged.
